About · Who I Am

I treat social media like infrastructure, not posting.

I'm Shreyas Bagal, co-founder of Webbloom Digital — a Pune-based digital marketing agency. We build organic and paid growth systems for brands that need to be taken seriously online — clinics, real-estate firms, founders.

I don't chase trends. I study what actually moves the needle on each platform — the hooks that stop scrolls on Reels, the formats LinkedIn rewards, the GMB optimisations that lift local search by 50+ ranks — and I run those plays consistently until the data backs the brand.

Three years in, I've put up 1.1M+ verified views for clients, taken a venture from #59 to top 5 on local search, ranked a Reddit post #1 in 24 hours, and built a personal brand from zero across four platforms simultaneously.

"Reach is cheap. Reach that converts is the whole job."

I'm equally comfortable scripting a hook for a Reel, optimising a landing page for SEO, building an n8n automation, or sitting in a strategy room talking funnel math. Whatever moves the brand forward this week — that's the job.

What I do.

SECTION · 02
01 — STRATEGY

Social Media Management

I run Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, and YouTube end-to-end — calendars, posting cadence, community engagement, brand voice. The goal: a consistent presence that earns trust before it asks for sales.

CalendarsEngagementBrand Voice
02 — PERFORMANCE

Meta Ads & Lead Gen

I run paid campaigns the way performance marketers should: audience research first, three creative variants minimum, ruthless A/B testing. CPLs land in the ₹20–25 range. CPC drops 20–35%. Numbers, not vibes.

Meta AdsA/B TestingFunnel Design
03 — CONTENT

Reels & Short-form

I write hooks that stop the scroll and edit Reels in CapCut that ship daily. Painex hit 200K+ views per top reel. Kirti's IG ran a 365-day challenge that built compounding momentum. The hook is the strategy.

ReelsHooksCapCut
04 — DISCOVERABILITY

SEO & Local SEO

I treat Google My Business as a conversion engine. Listing optimisation, review strategy, keyword targeting on the website — Silver Horse went from #59 to top 5 on local search in two months. Real-world traffic, real-world enquiries.

GMBOn-page SEOReviews
05 — AUTOMATION

AI & Workflow Automation

n8n automations, WhatsApp lead workflows, AI prompt systems for content generation. The boring work — qualifying leads, scheduling follow-ups, surfacing insights — gets handled by systems so the team can focus on what humans do best.

n8nWhatsAppAI Prompts
06 — BRAND

Personal Branding

For founders who need to be the brand. Multi-platform voice (IG, LI, YT, FB), short-form authority content, monthly insights reports. Built Kirti Bhosale's presence to 155K+ combined monthly reach across four platforms — zero ad spend.

Founder BrandMulti-platformAuthority

Selected work.

SECTION · 03
Healthcare · Pune

The Painex Clinic + Headache & Migraine Clinic

Digital Marketing ManagerJan 2026 — Apr 2026
Painex Clinic @the_painex_clinic Headache & Migraine Clinic @headacheandmigraineclinic

— The Brief

A specialised pain-management clinic with two practices needed to translate clinical authority into digital trust. The category is brutal — patients only book when credibility lines up perfectly with desperation.

— My Strategy

I built a full-funnel system: Meta Ads at the top, social-led trust at the middle, WhatsApp automation at the conversion layer. Every Reel was scripted around a patient story — "She had headaches every single day. I asked ONE question…" — because in healthcare, narrative beats info every time.

— What I Executed

  • End-to-end digital strategy & brand positioning
  • Meta Ads with 3-variant creative testing
  • Hook-led Reels — patient narratives & syndrome explainers
  • Local SEO & Google My Business optimisation
  • WhatsApp automation for lead nurturing
  • Community engagement & reputation management

— Live Instagram Analytics · Verified

The numbers, straight from the source.

7 Feb — 30 Apr 2026 · Two clinics · Two audiences
— Reach & Views

742,806 views

94.2% from non-followers — proof the content broke out beyond existing audience and pulled cold reach organically.

— Format Strategy

Reels drove 95.6% of all views

Concentrated bet on short-form video paid off. Reels became the sole engine of reach.

— Conversion Signal

Profile activity +334%

2,825 visits (+342.8%) and 17 external link taps (+240%) — reach turned into intent.

— Top Performers

236K · 145K · 114K

Hook-led storytelling reels — patient narratives, syndrome explainers, "I asked one question…" patterns scaled past 100K views each.

Personal Branding · Real Estate

Kirti Associates LLP

Digital Marketing ExecutiveJun 2025 — Dec 2025
Kirti Bhosale @kirtibhosale_realtor

— The Brief

Kirti Bhosale, founder of Kirti Associates LLP, needed to translate decades of real-estate expertise into a credible personal brand — without losing the professional gravitas the industry expects.

— My Strategy

I built a multi-platform engine: short-form storytelling Reels for IG, infrastructure & market-update posts for LinkedIn, long-form authority content on YouTube, and Facebook as the cross-post amplifier. One voice, four formats, zero ad spend. The 365-Days Challenge gave us forced consistency, which is half the personal-brand game.

— What I Executed

  • End-to-end personal-brand strategy across IG · LI · YT · FB
  • Daily content design — Reels, carousels, infographics, Shorts
  • 365-Days Challenge content series for compounding consistency
  • Hook-led short-form scripts & thumbnails for YouTube
  • LinkedIn editorial calendar — market updates & regulatory news
  • Monthly performance reports for the founder

Real Estate · Ventures

Silver Horse Ventures

Marketing Analyst & Social Media ManagerSep 2024 — May 2025
Silver Horse Ventures @silverhorseventures

— The Brief

A new venture buried at #59 on local search, with thin organic reach and an underdeveloped Instagram presence. They needed visibility, credibility, and a content engine that could run daily without burning out the team.

— My Strategy

I treated GMB as the conversion engine and Instagram as the credibility layer. Optimised every listing detail, weaponised reviews, shipped daily content built in Canva & CapCut. Ranked a Reddit post #1 within 24 hours to earn organic credibility ahead of the paid push.

— What I Executed

  • Daily content creation for @silverhorseventures
  • Google My Business profile & listing optimisation
  • Review strategy & reputation management
  • Visual ad creatives, banners & promotional content
  • Audience targeting research & A/B test frameworks
  • Reddit-led PR — ranked #1 within 24 hours

SECTION · 07
I offer social media management across Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook and YouTube; Meta Ads and lead generation; short-form Reels and content strategy; SEO and local SEO via Google My Business; AI and workflow automation; and personal branding for founders. The work is full-funnel — from first impression to qualified lead.
For Painex Clinic I generated 742,000+ verified Instagram views in three months with a 334% lift in profile activity. For Kirti Associates I built 155,000+ combined monthly reach across four platforms with zero ad spend. For Silver Horse Ventures I took local search ranking from #59 to the top 5 within two months, and ranked a Reddit post #1 in 24 hours.
I consistently achieve a cost per lead in the ₹20–25 range on Meta Ads, with cost-per-click reductions of 20–35% through audience research, three-variant creative testing, and ruthless A/B iteration. I run paid campaigns the way performance marketers should — numbers first, not vibes.
Webbloom Digital is a Pune-based digital marketing agency co-founded by Shreyas Bagal. The agency takes on a focused number of client projects across social media marketing, Meta Ads, content, and local SEO. To start a project, reach out at shreyasbagal01@gmail.com or +91 93212 20379.
Three years across healthcare (Painex Clinic, Headache & Migraine Clinic), real estate and personal branding (Kirti Associates LLP), and ventures (Silver Horse Ventures). I'm equally comfortable scripting a Reel hook, optimising a landing page for SEO, building an n8n automation, or sitting in a strategy room talking funnel math.
